file.markdownDescription:
MaxMind GeoIP file (.mmdb)

The [MaxMind](https://www.maxmind.com/en/geoip2-databases) GeoIP DB file (.mmdb) to load. To learn more, see [loadGeoIPDB](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXLookup.loadGeoIPDB).

continentField.markdownDescription:
Field name for continent geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the continent geo-reference data (e.g., "my_continent"). Defaults to "continent". Set to "" to disable continent enrichment. (Default: continent)

countryField.markdownDescription:
Field name for country geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the country geo-reference data (e.g., "my_country"). Defaults to "country". Set to "" to disable country enrichment. (Default: country)

subdivisionField.markdownDescription:
Field name for subdivision geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the subdivision (state/region) geo-reference data (e.g., "my_region"). Defaults to "subdivision". Set to "" to disable subdivision enrichment. (Default: subdivision)

cityField.markdownDescription:
Field name for city geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the city geo-reference data (e.g., "my_city"). Defaults to "city". Set to "" to disable city enrichment. (Default: city)

postalField.markdownDescription:
Field name for postal code geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the postal code geo-reference data (e.g., "my_postal"). Defaults to "postal". Set to "" to disable postal code enrichment. (Default: postal)

latitudeField.markdownDescription:
Field name for latitude geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the latitude geo-reference data (e.g., "my_latitude"). Defaults to "latitude". Set to "" to disable latitude enrichment. (Default: latitude)

longitudeField.markdownDescription:
Field name for longitude geo-reference

Specifies the field name to store the longitude geo-reference data (e.g., "my_longitude"). Defaults to "longitude". Set to "" to disable longitude enrichment. (Default: longitude)
